title: Red Hat Security Advisory: gnupg2 security update
overview:
An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: gnupg2 security update

An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for gnupg2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
gnupg2-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.src.rpm
gnupg2-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.x86_64.rpm
gnupg2-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.s390x.rpm
gnupg2-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.ppc64le.rpm
gnupg2-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-debugsource-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.aarch64.rpm
gnupg2-smime-debuginfo-2.3.3-4.el9_4.1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-68973: A flaw was found in GnuPG. An attacker can provide crafted input to the `armor_filter` function, which incorrectly increments an index variable, leading to an out-of-bounds write. This memory corruption vulnerability may allow for information disclosure and could potentially lead to arbitrary code execution.
